title: Report
name: Report
queryMapping:
SELECT
COUNT(lbc_budget_code) C,
SUM(opening) A,
SUM(allocated) B,
SUM(commits) D,
SUM(expenses) E,
SUM(total_expenses) F,
SUM(balance) G
FROM (
SELECT
lbc_budget_code,
acm_acct_desc,
fty_fund_type,
oun_code,
ccr_costcentre,
at_activity_code,
sum(ifnull(opening,0)) opening,
( sum(ifnull(initial,0)) +
sum(ifnull(virement,0)) +
sum(ifnull(additional,0)) +
sum(ifnull(topup,0)) +
sum(ifnull(opening,0))
) allocated,
sum(ifnull(commit,0)) commits,
sum(ifnull(expenses,0)) expenses, sum(ifnull(commit,0)) + sum(ifnull(expenses,0)) total_expenses,
( sum(ifnull(initial,0)) +
sum(ifnull(virement,0)) +
sum(ifnull(additional,0)) +
sum(ifnull(topup,0)) +
sum(ifnull(opening,0))
) -
(
sum(ifnull(locked,0)) +
sum(ifnull(pre_request,0)) +
sum(ifnull(request,0)) +
sum(ifnull(commit,0)) +
sum(ifnull(expenses,0))
) balance
FROM
( SELECT
b.bdg_budget_id,
sb.lbc_budget_code,
am.acm_acct_desc,
b.sbg_budget_id,
sb.fty_fund_type,
sb.oun_code, ou.oun_desc,
sb.ccr_costcentre, cc.ccr_costcentre_desc,
sb.at_activity_code,
ifnull(bdg_bal_carryforward,0) opening,
ifnull(bdg_initial_amt,0) initial,
sum(ifnull(virement,0)) virement,
sum(ifnull(additional,0)) additional,
sum(ifnull(topup,0)) topup,
sum(ifnull(pre_request,0)) pre_request,
sum(ifnull(request,0)) request,
sum(ifnull(commit,0)) commit,
sum(ifnull(locked,0)) locked,
sum(ifnull(expenses,0)) expenses
from ) x
WHERE 1=1 $filter
group by
lbc_budget_code,
acm_acct_desc,
fty_fund_type,
oun_code,
ccr_costcentre,
at_activity_code
) tbl

title: Budget Structure List
name: StructureBudgetListV2
queryMapping:
SELECT
    sbg_budget_id AS ID,
    fty_fund_type AS FUND,
    oun_code AS OUN,
    ccr_costcentre AS CCR,
    sb.at_activity_code AS ACTIVITY,
    (
        SELECT
            at_activity_description_bm
        FROM
            activity_type at
        WHERE
            at.at_activity_code = sb.at_activity_code
    ) activity_desc,
    lbc_budget_code AS BUDGETCODE,
    (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            lbc_description
        FROM
            lkp_budget_code bc
        WHERE
            sb.lbc_budget_code = bc.lbc_budget_code
    ) lbc_description,
    IF(acm_defisit = 'N', 'NO', 'YES') AS DEFISIT,
    IF(sbg_status = '1', 'ACTIVE', 'INACTIVE') AS STAT,
    sby_year AS Year
FROM
    structure_budget sb
